summary: Fixed three review findings: removed the dead makeExecFn helper from tests, tightened the run.mjs guard from `completed > 0` to `completed > 0 && blocked === 0` so the simplify pass only runs when all tasks pass review, and wrapped the runGateFn call in a try/catch so exceptions trigger revert instead of leaving agent changes unreversed. Added a test covering the gate-throws path.
